CSMAX270

Cultural Perspectives for Computing and Mathematical Sciences

2026

15

200

B Trimester

Hamilton, Tauranga

DSIGN252

Jump to

The paper provides students with an understanding of scientific and culture-specific perspectives on issues in computing and mathematical sciences. Students will learn how these perspectives can be applied in diverse cultural, international, ethical, and professional contexts.

Teaching Periods and Locations
26B (HAM)
Paper outline 		B Trimester :
13 Jul 2026 - 08 Nov 2026 		Hamilton 100% internal assessment
26B (TGA)
Paper outline 		B Trimester :
13 Jul 2026 - 08 Nov 2026 		Tauranga 100% internal assessment

If your paper outline is not linked below, try the previous year's version of this paper.
